content: اِلعَماَل هُمّا اِللي مَسموح لَهُم يِدخُل هِنا بَسّ
translations: eng:only workers are allowed to enter here

transcriptions.arabizi: ilAamael hummail-li masmooh|lu|hum yidhul|uh hina bass
